title: Add 2026-03-20 11L dense-lexical submission candidate
body:
## Summary
- add `records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-20_Int6MLP3x_11L_SmearGate_Bigram4096x128_MuonWD038_SWA50_DocSliding`
- include the recorded `8xH100` train log, local trainer, legal eval CSVs, and reproduction scripts
- document the chosen legal `int6_zstd_core` + `doc_sliding 2048/256` result: `val_loss=1.95474571`, `val_bpb=1.15677715`, `artifact_bytes=15704854`

## Notes
- this folder contains one recorded training run only, so it should be treated as a single-run candidate rather than a statistically demonstrated new record
- the checked-in `train_gpt.py` is a whitespace-trimmed copy of the logged trainer source so the file stays under the repo's 1500-line limit; only blank lines were removed
- the integrated export path printed in `train.log` was slightly over the 16 MB cap, so the promoted score in this folder comes from the included legal re-export path
